description: Approved MCP servers for Team RAM harness. All agents use these through MCP_DOCKER toolkit or allura-brain tools.

allura-brain.rationale: Core governed memory system. All agents must search before acting and write after completing.

neo4j-memory.rationale: Semantic memory (Neo4j graph). Knowledge retrieval and relationship queries via MCP_DOCKER toolkit.

neo4j-cypher.rationale: Ad-hoc Cypher queries. Debug and diagnostic use only.

database-server.rationale: Episodic memory (PostgreSQL). Append-only event traces and vector embeddings via MCP_DOCKER toolkit.

context7.rationale: Library documentation lookup. Used by context7 skill.

perplexica.rationale: Self-hosted AI search via Perplexica/Vane. Replaces Tavily — no API key required.

allura-graph-debug.rationale: Read-only graph debugging. No writes permitted.

allura-propose-promotion.rationale: Propose memories for canonical promotion. Does not approve — that requires allura-approve-promotion.

allura-approve-promotion.rationale: HITL curator approval for canonical promotion. curator_id must identify a human.

allura-health-observability.rationale: System health and queue observability. Read-only diagnostics.
